title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at ACC Limited

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at ACC Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at ACC Limited are looking for an experienced Plant Manager based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About ACC Limited:
ACC Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in PPAP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ACC Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
